extDescription.message:
WhatsApp Web feels like it's frozen in time. It demands half your screen like it's 2015. Try using it alongside code, docs, design tools, or even a browser tab split — it just breaks down. The layout collapses, text gets awkward, and it's clearly not designed to be resized down to a phone-like width.

In a world where multitasking is the default, WhatsApp Web insists on being the main character.
After getting annoyed one too many times, I finally thought: fine, I'll try to fix it myself.
